46.reason: [The size passed to qsort is incorrect; it should be 'num3', not 'num3+1', as there are only 'num3' elements in array 'd'. This leads to undefined behavior by accessing out-of-bounds memory.]

49.reason: [Accesses d[i+1] when i == num3-1, which is out of bounds. Also, the condition 'd[i].pow!=0' incorrectly skips combining terms with exponent 0.]
